subject: Q4 acquisition details
body: Hi Jane, please see the attached acquisition pricing model for the target company. This is still confidential and not for external distribution.

message: Can you keep the 2.1x multiple and revenue assumptions quiet until after the call? No internal distribution.
Attached the draft earnings forecast that includes the non-public margin assumptions. Only share with the Core Strategy subgroup.

subject: Draft deal memo
body: Please review the draft deal memo and confirm whether the pricing detail can be shared with your team. Do not circulate beyond the recipients.

message: FYI: The client renewal target is $28M and we need to keep the product roadmap conversation internal until after Q3 close.
